ImageGeneration.title: ImageGeneration
ImageGeneration.description: Represents a generated image and its metadata

prompt.description: The truncated/display prompt for the image

fullPrompt.description: The full prompt used to generate the image

imageData.description: Base64 encoded webp or jpeg data for the image

userId.description: The UID of the user who created it

aspectRatio.description: The aspect ratio of the image

style.description: The style applied to the generation

likesCount.description: Number of likes the image has received
